column2: CalPERS co-founded EDCI in 2021 and serves on the steering committee
EDCI launched with 7 GPs and 9 LPs/IMs representing about $4 trillion in AUM and
now has over 200 GPs and 100 LPs/IMs representing about $26 trillion of AUM
Since Q4 2022, CalPERS worked to increase the participation of its active Buyout
